---
title: "RDS Audit Dashboard"
format: dashboard
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source("R/setup.R")
source("R/functions.R")

# Run audits for all sites
sites <- c("Nairobi", "Eldoret", "Kisumu", "Mombasa")
results <- lapply(sites, run_rds_audit)
names(results) <- sites

# Combine summaries
all_summaries <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(results), function(site) {
    results[[site]]$summary %>% mutate(Site = site)
  })
) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = Site, values_from = value)

# Prepare data for plots
flow_data <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(results), function(site) {
    results[[site]]$summary %>% 
      filter(metric %in% c("Total CTF coupons", "Clean CTF Coupons", "Total Survey Records", "Valid Coupon Matches")) %>%
      mutate(stage = case_when(
        metric == "Total CTF coupons" ~ "Coupons Issued",
        metric == "Clean CTF Coupons" ~ "CTF Cleaned",
        metric == "Total Survey Records" ~ "Survey Interviews",
        metric == "Valid Coupon Matches" ~ "Valid Matches"
      )) %>%
      select(stage, value) %>%
      mutate(Site = site)
  })
)
```

RDS Audit Dashboard
===================

Column {data-width=600}
-----------------------

### Summary Table

```{r}
DT::datatable(all_summaries, options = list(pageLength = 10))
```

Column {data-width=400}
-----------------------

### Flow Diagram

```{r}
p <- ggplot(flow_data, aes(x = stage, y = value, fill = Site)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "RDS Reconciliation Flow by Site", y = "Count", x = "")
plotly::ggplotly(p)
```

## Site Results

### Nairobi

```{r}
results[["Nairobi"]]$summary
```

#### Nairobi Duplicate Coupons

```{r}
results[["Nairobi"]]$duplicates
```

### Eldoret

```{r}
results[["Eldoret"]]$summary
```

#### Eldoret Duplicate Coupons

```{r}
results[["Eldoret"]]$duplicates
```

### Kisumu

```{r}
results[["Kisumu"]]$summary
```

#### Kisumu Duplicate Coupons

```{r}
results[["Kisumu"]]$duplicates
```

### Mombasa

```{r}
results[["Mombasa"]]$summary
```

#### Mombasa Duplicate Coupons

```{r}
results[["Mombasa"]]$duplicates
```
</content>
<parameter name="filePath">g:\GitHub\APHRC\cipse_rds_analysis\dashboard.qmd
